schema.description: A request to install the Tartabit plugin for 1NCE OS.

serverDomain.description: Tartabit IoT Bridge host domain. Must be a valid hostname.

webhookKey.description: Webhook Secret from service specification in Tartabit IoT Bridge. Must contain valid uri characters.

schema.title: Tartabit plugin installation

body.description: The request body to setup the Tartabit plugin.
